name: fengshui-master-capability-matrix
purpose: Machine-readable capability and limitation matrix for portable agent routing, user-facing scope disclosure, integration checks, and roadmap triage.

capabilities.title: Form-school spatial analysis for homes, offices, shops, rooms, and sites
limitations: raw photo, map, and computer-vision parsing are not included
structural engineering and architectural code review are outside scope
adaptation_notes: Use structured floor-plan JSON when repeatability matters.
Ask for missing measurements before precise spatial claims.

capabilities.title: Later-heaven bagua direction, trigram, phase, and life-area mapping
guardrails: do not mix bagua methods silently
do not guarantee wealth health relationship or career outcomes
limitations: symbolic bagua and compass bagua can produce different mappings
sector mapping alone does not prove auspiciousness
adaptation_notes: Require the agent to name compass, later-heaven, or symbolic bagua before interpreting a sector.

capabilities.title: Eight Mansions ming gua helper and direction grouping
required_inputs: traditional sex input if using the common formula
li chun or lunar boundary convention when precision matters
guardrails: confirm li chun or lineage-specific year boundary when precision matters
do not reduce a person to one direction
prioritize safety comfort and real use
limitations: uses a common simplified formula
does not replace lineage-specific Eight Mansions consultation
adaptation_notes: Use as a personal-direction scaffold, then check form, comfort, and room function.

capabilities.title: Gregorian-year heavenly stem, earthly branch, zodiac, yin-yang, and phase scaffold
required_inputs: boundary convention near late January or early February when relevant
guardrails: do not present year scaffold as complete bazi
confirm li chun or lunar-year boundary near transitions
limitations: not a complete natal chart
does not calculate month day hour pillars
adaptation_notes: Use only as year-level symbolic context unless a full external bazi engine is supplied.

capabilities.title: San Yuan nine-period timing scaffold
required_inputs: building completion or occupation year if applying to a building
guardrails: verify lineage and calendar boundary before exact flying-star work
do not treat period alone as a complete reading
limitations: covers common 1864-2043 period sequence
does not automate full building natal chart lineage variants
adaptation_notes: Use as a timing layer, then request facing degree and building data for xuan kong work.

capabilities.title: Annual tai sui, sui po, and san sha directional cautions
supported_questions: tai sui and san sha overview
guardrails: do not declare a direction impossible to use for the whole year
permits safety and contractor constraints take priority
limitations: common annual directional scaffold only
monthly day and personal clash layers are not automated
adaptation_notes: Recommend quiet, cleanliness, reduced disturbance, and practical scheduling before costly cures.

capabilities.title: New moon, full moon, waxing, and waning moon symbolic timing
supported_questions: new moon versus full moon launch
required_inputs: local time zone when precision matters
guardrails: moon phase is a secondary symbolic timing layer
limitations: approximate moon-phase helper only
not a precision astronomy engine
does not calculate full tong shu date attributes
adaptation_notes: Use new moon for contained beginnings and full moon for visibility only when the event type fits.

capabilities.title: 24 solar terms and seasonal qi symbolic timing
limitations: helper uses common approximate Gregorian dates
exact solar-term moments and timezone-specific astronomy are not included
adaptation_notes: Use as seasonal posture, then compare event type, weather, deadlines, and practical constraints.

capabilities.title: Xuan Kong flying-star scaffold
required_inputs: whether natal annual or monthly layer is requested
guardrails: not a full Xuan Kong natal chart
do not present scaffold as full natal chart
limitations: full natal chart, replacement stars, and lineage variants are not automated
requires reliable facing and building-period data
adaptation_notes: When inputs are vague, return a method checklist instead of a precise judgment.

capabilities.title: Date-selection intake and symbolic timing comparison
required_inputs: people involved when personal clashes matter
trusted almanac attributes if exact electional work is requested
guardrails: professional and practical constraints take priority
limitations: 12 officers, 28 mansions, day officers, personal clashes, and full tong shu data are not automated
exact electional work needs a trusted calendar or lineage source
adaptation_notes: If users provide almanac attributes, compare them cautiously instead of inventing missing calendar data.

capabilities.title: Yin-house and burial-site boundary guidance
required_inputs: photos or map description if available
guardrails: do not apply yang-house rules directly
limitations: advanced yin-house lineage formulas are not automated
legal cemetery rules and family consent are outside symbolic analysis
adaptation_notes: Keep outputs conservative and focused on intake, ethics, and observable form.

capabilities.title: Life pattern, luck, omen, auspiciousness, and ji/xiong symbolic analysis
supported_questions: practical qu ji bi xiong planning
guardrails: do not predict health death wealth marriage or disaster
separate reality layer from symbolic layer
limitations: complete bazi, zi wei, qimen, liuren, and full almanac readings are outside current scope unless external tools are supplied
symbolic interpretation does not override user agency
adaptation_notes: Frame ji/xiong conditionally: what supports, what leaks, what can be reduced, and what evidence would change the reading.

capabilities.title: Finance and investing symbolic decision support
limitations: no investment recommendation engine
no market-price forecasting
no tax or legal optimization
adaptation_notes: Use five phases as a risk-and-behavior lens: Water liquidity, Wood growth, Fire heat, Earth reserves, Metal discipline.

capabilities.title: Business, brand, naming, product, UX, career, learning, and relationship adapters
guardrails: do not guarantee revenue adoption career or relationship outcomes
do not replace trademark accessibility privacy security or consent review
limitations: symbolic adapters are not classical doctrine by themselves
domain-specific expert review may still be required
adaptation_notes: Use feng shui symbolism as a fit check after real product, audience, legal, safety, and evidence constraints.

capabilities.title: Wellbeing and legal-adjacent symbolic support with high-stakes boundaries
guardrails: legal deadlines and counsel take priority
limitations: does not provide medical diagnosis treatment legal interpretation or compliance advice
symbolic timing never overrides deadlines or professional counsel
adaptation_notes: Lead with professional boundaries, then offer low-risk environmental or preparation steps.

capabilities.title: Portable agent integration, routing, response contracts, and evaluation
supported_questions: register tools in an agent framework
limitations: host platforms must provide their own runtime, retrieval, and policy enforcement
validators check metadata structure, not every possible model answer
adaptation_notes: Use this matrix to decide which references and tools to expose for a given domain.

capabilities.title: Full bazi or four-pillars natal charting
supported_questions: scope disclosure for full bazi requests
what data would be needed for external bazi work
required_inputs: trusted external bazi engine or lineage source if exact work is required
guardrails: do not present year scaffold as complete bazi
do not predict health death wealth marriage or disaster
limitations: complete four-pillar charting is outside current scope
zi wei qimen liuren and full tong shu calculations are outside current scope
adaptation_notes: Answer by explaining the boundary, using available symbolic life-pattern tools cautiously, or asking the user to provide a trusted external chart.
